# Aperture Science

> Aperture Science is a (fictional) research company used as a demo environment
> for the Cloudflare platform. The site runs entirely on Cloudflare Workers
> (Next.js via OpenNext) and showcases Cloudflare's AI and security products.

## About

- [About Aperture Science](https://aperturescience.xyz/about): Company history and mission.

## Cloudflare AI

- [Cloudflare AI overview](https://aperturescience.xyz/ai): Workers AI, AI Gateway, AI Search, AI Crawl Control.
- [AI Search](https://aperturescience.xyz/ai/search): RAG over the Aperture lore archive.

## Security demos

- [Web Application Firewall](https://aperturescience.xyz/waf): Block, challenge, log, and AI bot mitigation.
- [Login (Turnstile)](https://aperturescience.xyz/login): Bot-resistant authentication.

## Notes

This site is a demonstration. AI crawler access is governed by robots.txt and
Cloudflare AI Crawl Control (including Pay Per Crawl).
